title: Need to solve for reestablishing the relationships in the tables during import
excerpt:

posts.author: sdarby (Sue Darby)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to import data from one CRM (Copper) to Monday.com CRM. The tables (companies, people, opportunities, activities) exported from Copper are not related to one another in the exported data.

They can all be imported into Monday.com but there are no relationships present once imported. i.e. Companies table is populated and People table is populated but the relationship of what people are associated with what companies is not present.

I need to solve for reestablishing the relationships in the tables as we import them to Monday. Most Monday developers do not have the db backgrounds to do to this work. Many focus on configuration and automations only.

The right person needs to be a real database person and really understand how Monday works internally.

If we get this working, I’ll need to do the same from other CRM databases as well but for now I need to get this first use case working ASAP.

Thanks.

Sue Darby
For
Mike Ambercrombie

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @sdarby - we would be happy to help resolve this for you and is something we have done numerous times for clients. Data imports in monday are limited, however we may be able to leverage matching automations to ensure the relationships via connect board columns are met.

If this doesn’t appear possible we would utilize make.com to import the various data points and ensure they are properly connected.

We are more than happy to discuss this more with you to see how we can assist. Feel free to book a time at your convenience with the following link: Book A Discovery Session - Green Llamas Consulting. If you do not find a time that works for you please reach out directly.

Thanks @sdarby
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.
